summary: Phase 3: Re-embed full corpus against ollama/nomic-embed-text (pinned v2 model)

resolution.note: Phase 3 complete. Pivoted from Google text-embedding-005 to ollama/nomic-embed-text (keeps pipeline fully local). Full 2531-chunk corpus re-embedded; chunk_embeddings now the uniform source of truth. Phase 4 (remove ChromaDB) can proceed safely — SQLite is authoritative.
